'''Shannur Darkstar''' was a [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] around [[3000 BBY]]. She was one of the investigators of the ruins of [[Pelgrin]], following the archaeological team of [[Ermin Phin-Mar]]. The [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] were especially interested in the [[The Oracle (Pelgrin)|Oracle]], a structure that emitted tremors in [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] and could only be activated by [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitives]]. Shannur and her fellow Jedi discovered the Oracle was a device used in combination with the Force to foresee the future. Meditating in the presence of the Oracle, Shannur foresaw the [[New Sith Wars|Light and Darkness War]].
